title: Ability to click URL in dynamic value link in Monday Doc
excerpt: If you have a link/url coming from a column through the dynamic value link of the monday doc, you can’t access that link in the monday doc itself by simply clicking. It only acts like a clickable link in the exported pdf…

posts.author: Dian94 (Dian Maritz)
posts.cookedHtml:
If you have a link/url coming from a column through the dynamic value link of the monday doc, you can’t access that link in the monday doc itself by simply clicking. It only acts like a clickable link in the exported pdf version. If you do click it, it simply just brings up the dynamic value link menu which is not useful.

I can kindof get around this by highlighting the area in “Reading mode” of chrome then you can copy it from the reading panel and paste it in the search bar however this is very long winded for a very simple task.
